apply.title: Apply {{n}} changes?
apply.inplaceFootnote: A backup is made before applying; if verification fails it is rolled back automatically, leaving no changes.

delete.title: Delete this session?
delete.desc: Session "{{title}}" ({{tool}}) will be removed from this machine.
delete.bulletSub: This session contains {{n}} sub-sessions, which will also be deleted.
delete.bulletSnapshot: A backup is saved before deleting, so you can undo it right after.
delete.bulletOpenCode: OpenCode sessions cannot be undone in one click after deletion; only an exported backup is kept.
delete.bulletUndoable: You can undo the deletion from the toast.
delete.bulletBatchSnapshot: Each session is backed up before deletion, so you can undo it right after.
delete.bulletBatchOpenCode: {{n}} of them are OpenCode sessions that cannot be undone after deletion.
delete.bulletBatchRest: Undo only restores the most recent deletion; the rest must be recovered manually.

historyDelete.title: Delete this migration record?
historyDelete.desc: The record for “{{title}}” will be removed from Ferry's history.
historyDelete.bulletTarget: The session already migrated to {{tool}} is untouched and still resumable
historyDelete.bulletIrreversible: The record itself cannot be undone
